title: Sealapack FREEZER BAGS, RESEALABLE & REUSEABLE PACK OF 40 BAGS, Clear
features: FILL, EAT, REPEAT: Sealapack Reuseable Freezer Bags have a locking press seal, to ensure freshness. Safe to store food, freeze leftovers or securely marinate fish, meat or vegetables. Pull open, remove contents, wash the bag ready to reuse

EFFICIENT STORAGE, REDUCE FOOD WASTE: Freezers are often under used, make the most of these bags and reduce food waste, chop and freeze overripe fruit to quickly make a smoothie or fruit compote. Wash, chop and store excess vegetables and fresh herbs. Freeze leftovers and sauces once cooled
BULK BUY: Larger pack sizes of fresh meat, or fish can easily be separated into portions in each bag, seal and freezer.
TIME SAVING: Add a marinade to fish or meat, tumble chopped vegetables in herbs, seal and freeze to save time prep for future meals
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: BOX OF 40 REUSEABLE BAGS
description: Sealapack Reuseable Freezer Bags have a locking press seal, to ensure freshness.
